displayName: VAT Filing Receipt (irreversible one-shot, HMRC receipt bound)
description: Notarize-only record of the irreversible statutory filing and HMRC's returned verdict — THE SEAM. submittedReturnHash is sha256 of the EXACT canonicalized nine-box JSON body POSTed to HMRC (POST /organisations/vat/{vrn}/returns), binding the on-chain record to the precise bytes HMRC received. On acceptance, formBundleNumber (HMRC's 12-digit acknowledgement handle) + processingDate are HMRC's receipt — and formBundleNumber is the LEGALLY-OPERATIVE artifact: the taxpayer's proof of having filed, and of when, that is produced in a late-filing penalty dispute. On rejection, rejectionCode captures HMRC's typed statutory refusal (DUPLICATE_SUBMISSION / TAX_PERIOD_NOT_ENDED / VRN_INVALID / NOT_FINALISED / RULE_INSOLVENT_TRADER). The filing is irreversible: there is no amend/delete in VAT (MTD) v1.0; a re-file for the same (vrn, periodKey) is refused DUPLICATE_SUBMISSION and corrections go on a later return. AGLedger notarizes the filing and HOLDS HMRC's verdict; HMRC remains the sole authority on acceptance.

declarationRef.description: recordId of the FULFILLED vat-return-declaration-v1 whose held human declaration authorized this filing (chain lineage).

vrn.description: The 9-digit VAT registration number filed for.

periodKey.description: HMRC period key filed. With vrn, the irreversible one-shot identity.

submittedReturnHash.description: sha256:<hex> of the exact canonicalized nine-box JSON body POSTed to HMRC. Binds the record to the precise bytes HMRC received.

submissionStatus.description: accepted: HMRC returned 201 (formBundleNumber + processingDate present). rejected: HMRC returned a typed 4xx (rejectionCode present). prepared: the body is hash-bound but not yet POSTed (doc-grounded / no live token) — receipt fields empty.

formBundleNumber.description: HMRC's 12-digit acknowledgement handle. THE legally-operative receipt. Present when submissionStatus=accepted.

processingDate.description: HMRC's processing timestamp from the 201. Present when submissionStatus=accepted. Compared against the obligation dueDate for timeliness.

paymentIndicator.description: Optional: HMRC's returned payment indicator (direct debit / bank).

chargeRefNumber.description: Optional: HMRC's charge reference, returned only when netVatDue is a debit.

rejectionCode.description: HMRC's typed rejection code. Present when submissionStatus=rejected.

rejectionMessage.description: HMRC's rejection message, verbatim. Present when submissionStatus=rejected.
